home.title: Angular Developer
home.aboutMe: I am currently looking for a new opportunity as an Angular Developer.
home.aboutMe2: I have over 4 years of experience in developing web applications using Angular, TypeScript, and related technologies and around 8 years working in the frontend industry. I am passionate about creating efficient and user-friendly applications that meet the needs of users.
work.experience.title: WORK EXPERIENCE
work.experience.desc1: I worked as a Salesforce B2C Commerce Cloud developer, where I was responsible for developing and maintaining e-commerce websites using Salesforce's B2C Commerce Cloud platform. My role involved customizing storefronts as well as translating designs to code, implementing new features, and ensuring the smooth operation of the online stores.
work.experience.desc2: I worked at Aggity as an Angular developer for almost 4 years, where I was responsible for developing and maintaining web applications using Angular and additional libraries when needed. I also got to lead a project of 5 people where I had to manage the team and coordinate with the client to ensure the successful delivery of the different sections of the application.
work.wayfind.title: Navigation app
work.wayfind.desc: Navigation app built with NextJS and Google Maps API to search routes and directions.
work.wayfind.detail: Navigation app build with NextJS and Google Maps API to search routes and directions. This app allows users to login, search for routes, save favourites and important locations. Ease of use was paramount during the creation of this app.
work.caae.title: Certification management app
work.caae.desc: Migration of a large and complex Windows Forms application to a modern Angular web application.
work.caae.detail: Migration of a Windows Forms application to a modern Angular web application. I worked on the migration of the application from .NET Framework to Angular/C#, and I also implemented the integration of SharePoint with the application. I also worked with the client to ensure the smooth migration of the application and lead my team of 5 people in the implementation of the new features.
work.provalliance.title: Scheduler application
work.provalliance.desc: Scheduler Angular application for managing appointments and resources.
work.provalliance.detail: Scheduler Angular application for managing appointments and resources. I was the person who implemented the scheduler and the different features that the client required while also ensuring a clean structure of the application and code.
work.senner.title: Navigation app
work.senner.desc: Navigation app built with MAUI for logistics and transportation management.
work.senner.detail: Navigation app built with MAUI for logistics and transportation management. I worked on the whole booking system for the main web application, including some of the additional pages required for the zones and logistics. I also made the whole mobile application, which was built with MAUI.
